data.title: Bitdeer mined 146.2 BTC this week, bringing its total Bitcoin holdings to 1,998.3 BTC.
data.description: Bitdeer, a Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company, released its latest Bitcoin holdings data on the X platform. As of December 26, its Bitcoin holdings were 1,998.3 BTC. In addition, its Bitcoin mining output this week was 146.2 BTC, but it sold 144.7 BTC during the same period. The total Bitcoin holdings increased by 1.5 BTC compared to last week.

data.title: Lighter AMA: 50% of tokens allocated to the community, confirming the introduction of a token buyback mechanism.
data.description: During an AMA session themed "Lighter TGE," Lighter's Head of Marketing, @Pilla_eth, revealed some information regarding token issuance and product planning. He stated that Lighter's TGE and airdrop plan will take place in 2025, with the airdrop accounting for 25% of the total token supply. There will be no lock-up period, and users will not need to manually claim the tokens; they will be directly distributed to the Lightner wallets of token holders. Of the total token supply, 50% will be allocated to the community. The team confirmed the introduction of a token buyback mechanism, but the specific buyback scale has not yet been announced. More details about the token economic model will be gradually disclosed. Regarding trading and the ecosystem, the LIT token will initially only support trading within the Lighter platform. Coinbase and Bybit have included LIT in their respective listing roadmaps, but the team emphasized that they will not pay listing fees. Furthermore, the official team will not issue Lighter NFTs, but will recognize some community NFT projects, such as Fuego, and denied any meme coin airdrop plan. @Pilla_eth also revealed that Lighter is developing a mobile application with a target experience comparable to mainstream CEX applications.

data.title: UXLINK: The community unanimously approved the buyback and strategic reserve proposal, which will repurchase no less than 1% of tokens each month.
data.description: UXLINK announced on the X platform that the community has unanimously approved the buyback and strategic reserve proposal. According to the implementation plan, UXLINK will launch the program in December, using project profits each month to buy back no less than 1% of UXLINK's total supply and deposit it into the strategic reserve.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Trading Activity Observed in Key Address
data.description: According to Odaily, monitoring by Ai Yi has revealed significant trading activity from a specific address (0x50b...9f20). Since yesterday, this address has initiated a long position in Ethereum (ETH) and a short position in Bitcoin (BTC) nine hours ago. Currently, the address holds a long position of 27,304 ETH, valued at $80.04 million, with an opening price of $2,931.9, resulting in an unrealized loss of $5,543. Additionally, it holds a short position of 250.36 BTC, valued at $21.91 million, with an opening price of $87,334.2, leading to an unrealized loss of $46,000. Since July of this year, the account has accumulated a profit of $3.638 million.
